[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000101000 2
1 0010000001 2
2 1000101001 4
3 0010000000 1
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0010010000 2
12 21 0100011000 3
23 32 0100001100 3
34 43 0000001001 2
45 54 1001100001 4
56 65 1000100001 3
67 76 0100001000 2
70 07 0010000000 1 match 3

02 20 0000010000 1
13 31 0110001001 4
24 42 0000101000 2 match 0
35 53 0010000001 2 match 1
46 64 1000101001 4 match 2
57 75 0010000000 1 match 3
60 06 0000000000 a match 4 5 6 7
71 17 0110001000 3

03 30 0010000000 1 match 3
14 41 0001001001 3
25 52 0000110000 2
36 63 0100001001 3
47 74 0000001000 1
50 05 0010010000 2
61 16 0100001001 3
72 27 0100001000 2

04 40 0000000000 a match 4 5 6 7
15 51 0011010011 5
26 62 0100101000 3
37 73 0110001000 3
